cursor_task.title: Phase 12 - Social Login, SNS Sharing, Postcards, and Referral Growth
cursor_task.context: Read AGENTS.md, .cursor/rules/*.mdc, docs/spec/nihongo_bjt_cursor_master_spec_v14.md and docs/spec/nihongo_bjt_cursor_master_spec_v14_1_final.md before editing. The project must support low-friction login and organic growth through privacy-safe shareable learning achievements.
cursor_task.goal: Implement production-grade foundations for social login, account linking, shareable SNS postcards, public share pages, referral tracking, and admin growth management.

must_follow.item: Implement Google OAuth provider abstraction first; Apple/Facebook/LINE must be architecture-ready.
Use an identity provider account table, not one provider column on users.
Do not create fake social login buttons without backend flow.
Public share pages must be privacy-safe and contain only user-approved summary data.
Create reusable share image/postcard generation service.
Support Web Share API, copy link, and download image as baseline.
Add admin management for share templates, campaigns, referrals, and share analytics.
All referral rewards affecting limits must go through entitlement/quota services with audit trail.

deliverables.item: Database schema/migrations for identity_provider_account, login_event, share_item, share_card_asset, referral_code, referral_event.
Backend modules/services: AuthProvider, OAuthProvider, ShareImageRenderer, ShareService, ReferralService.
Share flows for streak, BJT quiz result, and daily phrase.
Public share pages with Open Graph metadata.
Admin pages for share template preview, referrals, and share analytics.
Tests for provider linking, share privacy, referral attribution, and permission checks.

quality_gate.item: Run lint, typecheck, tests, and migrations.
Verify no private learning data is exposed in public share pages.
Verify share image generation works with local/default renderer.
Verify admin growth pages are protected by RBAC.
